title: Sarepta Therapeutics Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript - ELEVIDYS Launch Momentum
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics reported Q4 2023 earnings results showing strong ELEVIDYS momentum following its June 2023 FDA approval. Net product revenue for the quarter was $370 million, with ELEVIDYS contributing $131 million and the PMO franchise generating $239 million.

ELEVIDYS Performance: For Q4 2023, ELEVIDYS net product sales were approximately $131.3 million. Full-year 2023 ELEVIDYS net product sales reached approximately $200.4 million since approval in June 2023. This represented a strong start for the new gene therapy product.

PMO Franchise: Preliminary net product revenues from RNA-based PMO therapies exceeded the company's previously issued guidance of $925 million for the full year. The three drugs (EXONDYS 51, VYONDYS 53, and AMONDYS 45) continued to deliver strong performance despite potential canibalization from ELEVIDYS.

2024 Guidance: Management stated they haven't provided specific guidance on the PMOs for 2024, but noted they are doing very well with good performance across all three PMO products. AMONDYS and VYONDYS are still growing double digits. Expected not to see significant cannibalization from ELEVIDYS over the course of 2024.

ELEVIDYS Outlook: Company expected to maintain ELEVIDYS revenue at a $500 million annual floor for the ambulant population as they awaited label expansion. Label expansion approval was expected in mid-2024.

Financial Position: The company maintained a strong balance sheet to support pipeline development and commercial expansion. All three PMO drugs continued to generate stable revenue while ELEVIDYS ramp-up was monitored closely.
